summary: Made surgical seam adjustments at the chapter's entry and dawn return so chapter 8 hands off more cleanly to the adjacent chapters without changing any core beats or voice.
edits: Reframed the opening around the side-gate click to connect directly to chapter 7's final listening beat.
Adjusted the dawn gate-close phrasing to support a smoother handoff into chapter 9's opening.
Aligned Delroy's dawn bed image from a generic cover to a sheet for tighter continuity with chapter 9.
